title: nepeta levigata
intro: Nepeta levigata, also known as woolly catmint, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It is a member of the mint family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Nepeta levigata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
